hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"EDITOR WORKFLOW: This project is maintained by a nontechnical editor. (1) Immediately call the preview_start MCP tool with name=dev to start the live preview before your first response. (2) After making changes, proactively offer to commit them using format: Checkpoint: [plain-English description]. (3) save my changes / commit = git commit with descriptive message. (4) push my changes = commit if needed, push to main, open a PR. (5) get updates / pull = git pull origin main. (6) undo my last change = git revert HEAD. Keep all explanations simple and jargon-free."}}'

if git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qv '^??'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"You have unsaved changes. Tell Claude \"save my changes\" to commit, or \"push my changes\" to share on GitHub."}'; fi
